/.description: canonical landing route for the work: dedicated web page if available, else the repo for software projects

repo.description: helper key for a source repository. not the /repo route alias

forges.description: alternative repository links on other git forges

/files.description: where to look at files, source code, media assets, project materials, or a direct download link for single-file works

/repo.description: alternative key for the `/files` route group of aliases, for a source repository

/source.description: alternative key for the `/files` route group of aliases, for source code

/src.description: alternative key for the `/files` route group of aliases, fr src cde

/assets.description: alternative key for the `/files` route group of aliases, for creative assets or media

/browse.description: alternative key for the `/files` route group of aliases, but as an action

/stuff.description: alternative key for the `/files` route group of aliases, for humans

/issues.description: the issue or bug tracker page for the usually-software project, or something adjacent like a status page for a service

/docs.description: documentation or help page, if separate from the landing page or repository

/funding.description: where to support, fund, sponsor, donate, or otherwise throw money at the work

/sponsor.description: alternative key for the `/funding` route group of aliases

/donate.description: alternative key for the `/funding` route group of aliases

/downloads.description: human-facing/pretty downloads or releases page for the work

/releases.description: alternative key for the `/downloads` route group of aliases

artifacts.description: direct download links used by the dynamic /download route

/feed.description: rss or atom feed for the blog, catalogue, or an adjacent collection work

/latest.description: latest thing for blogs, catalogues, or an adjacent collection work

/newest.description: alternative key for the `/latest` route group of aliases

/recent.description: alternative key for the `/latest` route group of aliases

allOf.description: define either / or the repo helper key
only one `/files` route-group key may be defined
only one `/funding` route-group key may be defined
only one `/downloads` route-group key may be defined
only one `/latest` route-group key may be defined
/download is owned by the resolver. don't define it here
